mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no, o.room_id, o.start_time, o.end_time, o.duration_minutes, o.room_amount, o.total_amount, o.status, o.remark, o.operator_id, o.closer_id, o.create_time, o.update_time, o.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(order_no, 12, 6) AS SIGNED)) FROM t_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT('KTV', #{dateStr}, '%') AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_order o WHERE o.room_id = #{roomId} AND o.status = 1 AND o.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
